t-1.notes: feature: code-quality audit · NewRun @ internal/quality/run.go · collision-safe per-run dir + <timestamp>-<short-sha> run-id under .dross/quality/

t-2.notes: feature: code-quality audit · Catalog @ internal/quality/catalog.go · data-driven dimension→analyzer table (Go-complete + agnostic), substantive-only, installed-vs-missing detection

t-3.notes: feature: code-quality audit · Ledger @ internal/quality/findings.go · maintainability-risk findings ledger (refutation-gated survivors, blast-weighted risk order, malformed-input guard)

t-4.notes: feature: code-quality audit · BuildManifest @ internal/quality/recon.go · code-only language detection + tool-coverage manifest recording ran vs skipped analyzers

t-5.notes: feature: code-quality audit · ScaffoldSpec @ internal/quality/scaffold.go · turns surviving findings into a remediation spec.toml, one risk-ordered criterion per finding citing its ledger id

t-6.notes: feature: code-quality audit · Quality @ internal/cmd/quality.go · dross quality detect/run/scaffold subcommands, sandboxed to .dross/quality/, partial-coverage run never hard-errors

t-7.notes: feature: code-quality audit · quality.md @ assets/prompts/quality.md · /dross-quality orchestration prompt — calibrate-only context, refute-panel, detect→gate→sweep, propose-then-ask scaffold, read-only

t-8.notes: feature: code-quality audit · TestQualityPromptMandatedSections @ internal/cmd/quality_prompt_test.go · per-rule sub-tests content-gating the locked quality.md prompt rules (refute, calibrate-only, gate, propose-then-ask, read-only)

t-9.notes: feature: code-quality audit · TestQualityArtifactsGitignored @ internal/quality/gitignore_test.go · gitignores .dross/quality/ so raw per-run findings are never committed
